systemStatus.headline: Sunday 4 AM run — yesterday's Toast (Apr 25) and today's Sling (Apr 26) not yet delivered.
systemStatus.detail: (1) Toast: No new Daily Performance Summary for Apr 25 yet — typically arrives ~7:40 AM PT. Latest available Toast email is Apr 24 (Friday) but body still un-extractable via Gmail MCP. (2) Sling: No daily report for Apr 26 yet — typically arrives ~7 AM PT. Most recent Sling = Sat Apr 25 (9 staff, 45 hrs, 0 OT, 0 uncovered). (3) Google Ads: 2 fresh Apr 25 reports arrived (Brewhouse Daily Campaign + Campaign performance) — emails contain dashboard links only, no parseable body. No disapprovals or budget alerts flagged. (4) Yelp: only marketing newsletter + a calendar update from imiller@yelp.com (Mon Apr 27 9 AM meeting). No customer inquiries. (5) TripAdvisor: no analytics email in last 24h. (6) Reviews: no new reviews since Apr 24 (K Vos 4★ still unanswered). (7) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.
